> Manual template note: GitHub milestones do not auto-apply repository templates.
> Copy/paste this structure into the milestone description field.
>
> This milestone description is the phase authority while the phase is active.

Title =>

Phase [0-N]: [Short Name]

Due date =>

[Optional date or "Gate-based"]

Description =>

Intent:
[1-3 lines describing what this phase must accomplish]

In Scope:

- [ ] [Concrete outcome 1]
- [ ] [Concrete outcome 2]
- [ ] [Concrete outcome 3]

Out of Scope (Optional):

- [Non-goal 1]
- [Non-goal 2]

Exit Criteria (Optional):

- [ ] Address all linked issues
- [ ] [Additional condition, if needed]

Linked Work:

- Open issues:
  - [#123]
- Closed issues:
  - [#124]

Evidence:

- PRs:
  - [#45]
- Validation:
  - [CI run / local evidence]
- Docs:
  - [doc path(s)]

Notes (Optional):

- [Operational note, blocker, or deferred item]
